message-flux-already-unlocked: The flux already flows through you.
message-sylphweed-ground-required: You need ground sylphweed to smoke the pipe.
message-flux-awakens: The smoke fills your lungs. A deep hum resonates through your body - flux awakens.
message-fire-awakens: The fiery paste burns in your veins - the fire element awakens.
blockdesc-sylphweed: A spectral herb that breathes with flux. Ancient air mages crushed its petals into ritual ink, using the dried blossoms to inscribe the first runes that unlocked dominion over wind.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment-up: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment-down: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment-north: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment-east: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment-south: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
blockdesc-ignis-fragment-west: A fire-touched flux echo crystallized around a rough stone pedestal. The shard still hums with trapped heat and can be harvested for later crafting.
itemdesc-sylphweed: Fresh sylphweed blossoms. Dry them with gentle heat before grinding.
itemdesc-sylphweed-dried: Dried sylphweed blossoms. Grind them in a quern.
itemdesc-sylphweed-ground: A fine aromatic powder. Load it into a bong and smoke it.
itemdesc-sylphweed-grounded: A fine aromatic powder. Load it into a bong and smoke it.
itemdesc-sylphweed-bong: A carved bong. Right-click while holding ground sylphweed to smoke it.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-unfired: A raw red clay bong awaiting the kiln.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-unfired-blu: A raw blue clay bong awaiting the kiln.
item-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired: Dark Brown Fired Clay Sylphweed Bong
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired: A dark brown kiln-fired sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired-tan: A kiln-fired tan sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired-orang: A kiln-fired orange sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired-red: A kiln-fired red sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired-cream: A kiln-fired cream sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired-gray: A kiln-fired gray sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-sylphweed-clay-bong-fired-black: A kiln-fired black sylphweed bong, ready for use.
itemdesc-ignis-fragment-gem: A searing crystal shard pried from its stone cradle. It still carries a restless inner heat.
itemdesc-ignis-fragment-gem-cracked: A bloomery-fired ignis shard, heat-stressed and fissured but still burning with trapped fire.
itemdesc-ignis-fragment-gem-core: A pulsing ember of raw flux, extracted from a cracked ignis shard with tongs.
itemdesc-crushed-ignis-fragment-gem: Glowing ignis crystal powder. Its heat clings to the fingertips long after contact.
itemdesc-ignis-paste: A volatile liquid paste made from ignis flux echoes. Drinking it awakens the fire element.
